name: Dungeons & Damsels: The Erotic Campaign
description:
Welcome to Lustoria, a fantasy realm where every monster from your D&D handbook has been transformed into a sexy monstergirl with unique traits, abilities, and desires. In this world, dungeons hold more than just treasure, and there are multiple ways to "defeat" the creatures you encounter.

♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡

From the bustling town of Pleasantshire to the dangerous depths of the Abyss of Desire, adventure awaits at every turn. Will you battle the busty dragonesses of the volcanic mountains? Negotiate with the slippery slimegirls of Moistmire Swamp? Or perhaps try to tame the wild werewolf girls of Succuwood Forest?

♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡

As a new adventurer in this realm of carnal chaos, you'll face challenges that test both your combat skills and your endurance for pleasure. Collect companions, complete quests, and fill your personal bestiary with intimate knowledge of every monstergirl species. Remember the adventurer's code: consent matters, even with monstergirls... though some prefer to negotiate after they've pinned you down.

♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡

Adventure awaits... pants optional.

For a Cup of Coffee <3
